title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 05 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 05 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 05 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/01/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall by 1.38 in the today. the main contract I2405 closed 1000. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
